meaning: n.机能心理学,实用第一主义,机能主义
examples: Can Formalism and Functionalism Communicate with Each Other?
Professor: Good afternoon. Last week we were discussing the theory of functionalism.
Today, I would like to discuss some of the weak points of the theory of functionalism.
Pope Francis referred to the diseases of "excessive planning and functionalism" and of "bad coordination, " which he said could occur when members did not collaborate with each other.
